sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for Genesis version

special_mechanics.name: climbing
special_mechanics.description: Conrad can climb onto ledges and surfaces

special_mechanics.name: ledge_grab
special_mechanics.description: Conrad can grab and climb onto ledges

special_mechanics.name: elevation_traversal
special_mechanics.description: Multi-level altitude traversal requiring jumping between different height levels

special_mechanics.name: fall_damage
special_mechanics.description: Conrad dies if falling from great heights, indicating fall damage threshold exists

special_mechanics.name: elevator_use
special_mechanics.description: Conrad can use elevators to change elevation

tier_notes: T2 tier - qualitative data only. Wikipedia documents Conrad exhibits 'realistic human running speed and jumping ability' and features 'fluid movements' characteristic of rotoscoped animation. No precise physics parameters documented for Genesis version. Game features multiple altitude levels requiring spatial puzzle-solving. Fall damage mechanic indicates significant gravity/momentum commitment.
